title: Add streaming responses
steps: Research Anthropic streaming API format (messages.stream() or stream: true).
Backend: new SSE endpoint POST /chat/stream. Stream chunks as SSE events. Save to DB on complete. Keep old /chat as fallback.
Frontend: streamMessage() function using fetch + ReadableStream. Process SSE chunks with onChunk callback.
Frontend: streaming state in App.tsx. Append empty message, update on chunks, finalize on done. Disable send during streaming. Auto-scroll.
acceptance_criteria: Message saved to DB after stream completes
